hypothesis_en: Mr President, Mr Ortundo has not mentioned me personally, but he has referred to some of the statements I have made during the debate and I understand that I have the right, on the basis of Article 122, to respond to those allusions where he has cited some of the statements I have made. Mr President, the regulation sets a maximum of three minutes for the response to personal references. I simply want to say that he should go around his own house, because, no matter how much the only political responsible person I have serious doubts about a person who links an unconstitutional project that seeks to blow up the unity of Spain has been the president of the autonomous government of his party.
reference_en: thank you very much Mr President Mr Ortuondo didn't refer to me by name but he s= said s= something about something that I said in the course of the debate and I think that on the basis of Rule one two two I have the right to refer to those allusions those references he did quote some= something that I said normally President I (1.69) do not go for that kind of debate I think that one's dirty washing should be washed at home but truth i= is truth whoever says it (1.29) Mr President and Mr Ortuondo should have a look around his own home before he starts giving advice to others get his own house in order Mr President the Rules provide for a maximum of three minutes to respond to these personal allusions I am saying that he should get his own house in order because although he doesn't may not like it the only group that's politically responsible I said political but one has one's doubts given certain statements that have been made the only po= politically responsible person is the President of his Party in Basque Country so I ratify what I said and don't withdraw a word thank you
source_es: gracias señor Presidente el Señor Ortuondo no me ha mencionado personalmente pero se ha referido a unas manifestaciones que yo he hecho durante el debate y entiendo que tengo derecho sobre la base del artículo ciento veintidós a responder a esas alusiones donde él ha citado textualmente algunas de las manifestaciones que he hecho normalmente señor Presidente no suelo no suelo entrar al trapo de estos debates porque entiendo que los trapos sucios se lavan en casa pero la verdad señor Presidente es la verdad dígala Agamenón o su porquero y el señor Ortuondo antes de lanzarse a hacer aseveraciones y dar consejos a otros debería darse una vuelta por su propia casa porque mal que le pese señor Presidente el el Reglamento establece un plazo de tres minutos como máximo para la respuesta a las alusiones personales simplemente le quiero decir que debería darse una vuelta por su propia casa porque mal que le pese el único responsable político y cuando utilizo la palabra responsable tengo serias dudas sobre una persona que vincula un proyecto anticonstitucional que pretende hacer saltar por los aires la unidad de España fu= ha sido el Presidente del Gobierno autónomo de su partido por lo tanto señor Presidente me reafirmo en todo lo que he dicho y no retiro una sola de las palabras muchas gracias
